features: Body leaves your skin feeling cool, fresh, revitalised and gently fragranced
Gives confidence to feel more naturally attractive
description: Product Description Impulse offers you the good in all-over freshness and fragrance, giving you the confidence to feel more naturally attractive. It is wide range of high quality, body spray fragrances to deliver an invigorating sensation of light, fresh fragrance and gentle deodorant. Spraying them all over your body leaves your skin feeling cool, fresh, revitalised and gently fragranced. All Impulse products are dermatologically tested. Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citral, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool Directions Clean and dry the area where you want to apply the product. Apply a thin, even coat. Allow the product to dry completely before putting on clothes. Repeat application as needed or after physical activity for continuous protection. Safety Warning For External Use Only Box Contains 6 x Impulse True Love Body Spray 75ml See more
